caribbean.headline: Squalls Near Barbados with Rough Seas
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing east-southeast winds near 15 kt, seas building to 5.8 ft and an ESE swell period of 7 s, and I am monitoring scattered squalls. I expect scattered heavy showers with 75% rain probability and recommend mariners exercise caution, especially around Roatan where winds reach 23 kt and seas remain elevated.

mediterranean.headline: Lisbon Rain Focus; Mykonos Breezy at 21 kt
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing onshore winds near 11 kt with seas to 3.3 ft, a 7 s W swell, and a 75% rain probability that will likely reduce visibility and increase runoff. I note Mykonos is breezier with winds up to 21 kt and moderate seas, so I advise masters and operators to monitor the evolving rain and sea state.
